progress_summary: Portability audit of the shipped skill suite (why it works on the author's machine but not users'). Multi-agent sweep: 27 per-skill auditors + 5 fresh-machine simulations, adversarially verified — 157 findings survived (14 CRITICAL, 41 HIGH), 2 refuted. Two root causes, both now FIXED: (1) checkpoints never written on user machines because the bundled protocol routed all writes through the repo-only scripts/checkpoint.mjs CLI and told the model NOT to write JSON itself — rewrote oc-checkpoint-protocol SKILL.md so the model writes checkpoints directly with its file tools (CLI reframed as opchain-repo-only optional), and removed the oc-app-architect instruction to gitignore .checkpoints/. (2) cross-skill protocol never loaded because 10/27 skills didn't bundle references/orchestrator.md and 10/27 never instructed reading it — fixed sync-skill-bundles.mjs to create+guard the bundled files (was silently skipping missing ones), propagated the protocol into all 27 skills, and added the first-invocation bootstrap line to 9 runnable skills that lacked it. Regression guards added to gen-skills-catalog.mjs: fails the build on missing protocol files, missing bootstrap line, dangling references/ citations, and >1024-char descriptions. Also trimmed oc-migration-ops description (1242→984 chars, under the truncation limit) and fixed 5 dangling reference citations. gen-catalog + sync-bundles:check green; zips verified to carry the protocol for all 27 skills. Report: docs/audits/2026-07-04-portability-audit.md.

progress_table.label: Root cause 2 — protocol bundled + bootstrapped in all 27
gen-catalog + sync-check green; zips carry protocol

key_decisions: Both reported field symptoms (checkpoints not written; skills not chaining) traced to distribution/packaging, not logic: the repo's own hooks (.claude/settings.json Stop + PreToolUse) and scripts/checkpoint.mjs CLI silently satisfy the skills' unstated dependencies on the author's machine; none of it ships to users.

Fix strategy: single-source. Rewrote the protocol source (oc-checkpoint-protocol/SKILL.md) so sync-skill-bundles.mjs propagates the self-contained checkpoint-writing instructions to all 26 bundled copies at once.

sync-skill-bundles.mjs had two defects: it skipped any skill with no references/ dir, and only synced files that already existed (if(!exists)continue) — so missing bundled files were never created AND never flagged by the --check CI gate. Both fixed.
Portability grade: F (the suite had never been exercised outside this repo). The two root causes are now fixed; deeper chaining-determinism rework remains.
user_preferences: Wants concrete findings with file:line, not generalities.
Runs multi-agent workflows for substantive audits (ultracode).

next_actions: Cross-skill INVOCATION is now loadable everywhere but still not deterministic: handoffs rely on prose 'read that skill's SKILL.md' + description-keyword triggering rather than explicit Skill() tool calls. Only oc-git-ops -> oc-bug-check is deterministic. Convert the documented handoff points to explicit Skill() invocations with a graceful 'if the skill isn't installed' fallback.

oc-orchestrator's /oc-ops status|next|doctor commands are still implemented as the repo-only scripts/checkpoint.mjs CLI. The router now loads the protocol, but give it a portable fallback: read .checkpoints/*.checkpoint.json directly and summarize when the CLI is absent.
Single-skill (per-skill zip) installs: a skill that hard-invokes a sibling still breaks when that sibling isn't installed — no suite-wide fallback exists. Add one.

MEDIUM/LOW remainders in docs/audits/2026-07-04-portability-audit.md: .opchain/pm.yaml PM-integration assumes repo config; orphaned TRYIT.md files ship in zips; oc-dash-forge default checkpoint path is a Claude.ai sandbox path; internal 'aidops' jargon leakage.

fixes_applied: Rewrote oc-checkpoint-protocol/SKILL.md How-to-Write / Tooling / Scaffold sections: checkpoints are written directly with file tools; CLI is opchain-repo-only optional.
Fixed wire-version contradiction (schema example stamped 1.0 while prose mandates 1.1).
Fixed sync-skill-bundles.mjs to create missing references/ dirs+files and fail --check on missing.
Propagated orchestrator.md + checkpoint-protocol.md into all 27 skills (10 were missing each).
Added first-invocation bootstrap line to 9 runnable skills that lacked it.
Removed oc-app-architect instruction to gitignore .checkpoints/ (contradicted the protocol).
Added build guards to gen-skills-catalog.mjs: missing protocol files, missing bootstrap line, dangling references/ citations, >1024-char descriptions.
Trimmed oc-migration-ops description under the ~1024 truncation limit.
Fixed 5 dangling references/ citations in oc-deploy-ops, oc-stack-forge, oc-signal-forge.
skill_state.verification: npm run gen-catalog (27 skills) + npm run sync-bundles:check green; combined + per-skill zips confirmed to carry references/orchestrator.md + checkpoint-protocol.md for all 27 skills including the 4 that previously shipped with no references/ at all. Test-suite failures observed (demo-search, gen-roadmap, flags-skills) reproduce identically on clean main and are an environmental artifact of the empty hoisted node_modules in this .claude/worktrees sub-worktree — unrelated to these changes.
